name: Rustinel
description: Open-source cross-platform endpoint detection engine (EDR). Collects native host telemetry via ETW (Windows), eBPF (Linux) and Endpoint Security (macOS), normalizes it into a shared event model, and evaluates it against Sigma rules, YARA signatures and atomic IOCs — emitting ECS-compatible NDJSON alerts for SIEM pipelines. Tool: https://github.com/Karib0u/rustinel. This connector parses Rustinel's ECS NDJSON alert log (logs/alerts.json.<date>) and maps each detection to a finding on the originating host asset.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Rustinel ECS NDJSON alert log to parse (e.g. logs/alerts.json.2026-06-21). One JSON alert per line.

parameters.name: project
parameters.help: Optional host/asset name override. By default each alert's host.name is used as the asset, so a single file can fan out to several hosts.
